axioms.name: Trace necessity
axioms.statement: If irreversible traces do not re-enter selection, catastrophic repeats occur.

axioms.name: Trace overload
axioms.statement: If all traces re-enter, feasible path space collapses.

axioms.name: Regulation
axioms.statement: Persistence requires regulated effective memory: M_eff_t := C(H_M(DeltaPhi_0:t)).

axioms.name: Freedom coupling
axioms.statement: Forgetting is the minimal condition for freedom under irreversibility, but excessive forgetting increases repeat risk.
